reviews.text:
Unbelievable photos, incredible elopement planning!

From the moment we hired them, Mal and Roo presented us with several breathtaking locations for our ceremony, and helped us pick a place that was perfect for us. We were particularly impressed with the planning, and how well they kept to our schedule for the ceremony, a shoot with family, and individual photos, and made sure we were on time for our post-ceremony dinner.

They captured all the important moments, without distracting from the wedding itself, and turned around absolutely stunning pictures and video unbelievably fast.

Mal and Roo both have a great eye, and ensured our pictures did a great job showcasing us and our story, as much as the beautiful background.

They were thoughtful, genuine, and made us feel comfortable and at ease throughout the whole process. We would pick Castle House again without hesitation!

I am so thankful we found Roo!

I reached out to Roo and told him I wanted to have a ceremony where my family could attend but still have that adventure elopement feel to it. Family is everything to me but my parents have mobility issues. Roo offered so many suggestions!

He gave us different ceremony options, hike options, helped me make out an itinerary and answered any questions I had! He is so awesome to work and I cannot imagine working with anyone else throughout this experience.

Our wedding day was seriously perfect. Roo captured ALL the best moments and our video is epic. He made it so easy and it was like we were hanging out with a friend all day. It was by far one of the best decisions we made hiring him!

Thank you so much, Roo! We absolutely love our video!! We have received so many compliments on it! It truly is perfect, just like our wedding day!

Hiring Roo of Castlehouse Videography was the best decision my husband and I made after picking to Elope in Colorado.

My husband and I got engaged in January and wanted a late April wedding. Being a wedding planner professionally, I know what is typically possible to pull together in that timeframe while also having extremely high standards. From our first call, Roo made me feel like getting married in 3.5 months in Colorado was the easiest thing ever - he was prepared, willing to work with us on making certain we captured what was important to us, and an amazing advisor.

As for the process, Roo has it down. Hailing from Nashville, we needed a lot of help in picking the "right" place to get married, go for a post ceremony hike, and have a wedding meal with our parents. Roo on our first phone call went through a thorough "getting to know us" process which allowed us to express our desires for the day and how our visions aligned. Finishing up that first call just made me feel at peace in our decision to elope and do it in Colorado. Then it got better, he followed up via email with the best interactive map ever. We were able to get a feel for different areas of the state and feels depending on what sort of adventure we wanted. At that point we knew without a shadow of a doubt we'd be hiring Roo.

One thing we wanted in our videographer was someone who could work well with our photographer to pick the location of our elopement and Roo was up to the challenge. Not only that, Roo's personality is so enthusiastic and laid back at the same time that he works well everyone and makes everyone feel at ease!  Roo and our photographer (Alpine Vows Photography) met together on their own time and worked together to chose our ceremony site at Clinton Gulch Dam Reservoir and post wedding hike location of Mayflower Gulch.
Once the location was chosen, Roo remained extremely involved in the planning by giving me the recommendations of many of my wedding vendors, helping make certain we had the right gear for our wedding, and just making me comfortable with our timeline and plans.

Then came wedding day! Roo started his day off by offering to pick up our flowers from the florist in Boulder and transport them to Dillon, CO with him while still arriving even earlier than contracted. He was flexible and met my mom, mother in law and I at the salon to get “getting ready” shots and just had us cracking up and feeling like ourselves.
He then hung with us throughout the entire day, leading us through the perfect shots while keeping two people who don’t love being in front of the camera comfortable while during our ceremony and hike. He showed my husband how to check for avalanche danger, was prepared with extra snacks and just overall made us so comfortable and feel like best friends. We finished up the day back at the rental house having a lovely meal before saying goodbye to Roo, now not just our videographer but a friend.

We could have not done the entire day without Roo of Castlehouse Videography! And that was even before we received back our video.
Now, working in the industry I expected the typical turnaround time for a wedding video – 1 to 3 months. So MAN was I shocked when 1.5 weeks after our wedding day we got our wedding highlight film and the best photos in a secure, downloadable link. We were shocked with how much better everything came out than we could have even imagined. Roo made us look like movie stars and gave us epic photos to print for our walls and videos to watch forever!

I truly couldn’t imagine our wedding day without Roo of Castlehouse Videography. He made us laugh, made us feel comfortable, and just encouraged us to be ourselves. We are so grateful. If you are considering an elopement virtually anywhere, do yourself a favor and hire Roo!

Working with Roo for our elopement day was incredible from start to finish! He was communicative and reached out early when we first contacted him. We set up a call right away so he could get to know us and tell us about the process. Roo is a creative genius and let us be part of the process by suggesting some new ideas to make our video even better. We had a brainstorming call with him and did some pre-wedding filming to really capture our love story. He coordinated with our other vendors to make sure we had nothing to worry about on elopement day. He is so much fun to work with, but also focused on our story as a couple. He made us comfortable by letting us be ourselves and only guiding us as needed. He was helpful and actually made the day even more fun.

I really appreciated how he truly was honored to be part of our day. We did an adventure elopement that only included him and our photographer and he really took that to heart. It was very meaningful to know he understand how special that time was to us, and that he was honored to capture it.

Our videos and pictures (that we didn't even realize we were getting!?) were truly stunning and beyond anything we could have imagined. Roo listened to us and watched us as a couple and truly captured our love story. We were completely blown away by the video. I love that our video celebrated our love story, the beauty of nature, and was completely personal and based on us. Roo did not use a formula or cookie cutter design - every moment was reflective of us and showed how much thought he put into creating it.

Logistically, Roo is super organized and easy to work with. He also got us our video way ahead of his schedule! His creative mind and the intention he brings to his work truly set him apart. We could not be more grateful for the moments he captured. If you are a couple thinking of eloping because you want it to be special, intimate, and intentional, Roo is definitely your guy!

Roo knew the best spots in Washington state! We flew him in from Colorado and we had an absolute blast. He is genuinely so fun to be around very creative with the shots, location, drones, pics in the rain, and sunrise lighting :) We had him come along for an extra day for a personalized style shoot for vow writing and just overall adventuring around in the San Juan Islands hiking, exploring waterfalls and enjoying a sunrise canoe ride. My now wife and I HIGHLY recommend Castlehouse Videography for your elopement film, best decision we ever made!
